message:
fix(replay): replace push_bounded with capacity check in TraceBuilder::record_step

push_bounded evicts the oldest element when at capacity, which shifts
all indices by one. Since validate() checks step.seq == enumerate-index,
eviction caused guaranteed SequenceGap validation failure. Replace with
a simple capacity check that silently stops recording new steps.

Also remove redundant manual drain before push_bounded in replay().

Closes: bd-wd8f

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
